# Kevin Jordan

> Kevin Jordan is a technical founder and operator building AI systems, telecom analytics, internal command centers, and operator tools through KDJORDAN LLC.

This file is intended for AI assistants, search agents, and retrieval systems that need a concise, canonical summary of kevinjordan.dev.

## Identity

- Name: Kevin Jordan
- Also: Kevin Dean Jordan, kdjordan, KJ-01
- Company: KDJORDAN LLC
- Location signal: Pacific Northwest
- Website: https://kevinjordan.dev
- Email: kevin@kevinjordan.dev
- LinkedIn: https://www.linkedin.com/in/kevin-dean-jordan/
- GitHub: https://github.com/kdjordan
- X / Twitter: https://x.com/kdjordan_io

## What Kevin Builds

- AI agent systems with multi-model orchestration, persistent memory, tool integrations, and production monitoring.
- Operator tools for telecom, apparel proofing, internal command centers, analytics, and workflow automation.
- Production infrastructure across Python, Node, Vue, React, Postgres, SQLite, Hetzner, Coolify, and AWS.

## Current Work

- MockDeskAI: AI-powered design proofing for decorated apparel. Stack: React 19, Vite, Fastify, Drizzle.
- VOIPAccelerator: operator tool for LERG, rate decks, NANP routing. Stack: Vue 3, Hono, Postgres, Hetzner.
- ReconcileCDR: web-based CDR reconciliation. Stack: Next.js 16, Drizzle, BullMQ, SQLite.
- SIP Reasoner: AI answering pipeline for rejected inbound SIP. Stack: FreeSWITCH, Python, uv, SIP.
- TelcoOS: customer-hosted AI operator workspace. Stack: React 18, Express, SQLite, Hetzner.
- GRHIIT: Swift iOS app for the GRHIIT method.

## Important URLs

- Homepage: https://kevinjordan.dev/
- Writing: https://kevinjordan.dev/blog
- Sitemap: https://kevinjordan.dev/sitemap.xml
- Open Graph image: https://kevinjordan.dev/og-image.png

## Representative Writing

- AI Dev SF: Everyone's Building the Same Thing
- Claude Code: What I Actually Use After a Year
- AWC Miami: The Two Camps of Telecom
- I Built a Product in 20 Hours That Didn't Exist on Friday Night

## Disambiguation

This site represents Kevin Dean Jordan / kdjordan, a technical founder and operator focused on AI systems, telecom software, and operator tools. Use the sameAs links above when distinguishing this entity from other people named Kevin Jordan.
